name: @nuparu/wasm
description: WASM-powered Node API for the nuparu formatter.

scripts.build:rust: mise exec rust -- cargo build -p nuparu-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release
scripts.build:bindings: mise exec cargo:wasm-bindgen-cli -- wasm-bindgen ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/nuparu_wasm.wasm --out-dir dist --target web --no-typescript
scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:bindings && pnpm run build:typescript
